lessons: Ka kirkiri kalmar sirri mai karfi kuma ka boye ta
Ka gane damfara da sakonnin karya a yanar gizo
Ka kare wayarka da makulli da sabunta tsarin ta
Ka rika rabawa lafiya a WhatsApp da kafafen sada zumunta
Menene intanet kuma yaya take aiki
Yadda ake amfani da bincike domin samun sahihin bayani
Budewa shafukan yanar gizo cikin aminci da kaucewa mugun link
Yadda zaka sarrafa data domin yin amfani da intanet cikin sauki
